name: dev-team
description: Multi-agent development team. A Project Manager orchestrates a Researcher, Code Developer, Code Reviewer, Documenter, Integrator, and a Voice of Reason advisor through a Plan-Research-Develop-Review-Document-Integrate pipeline. Ships a shared coding-standards interface every agent honors, built-in analytics, and a gated integrator that never pushes/merges without human approval. Works across C# .NET / WPF, Angular, Vue, and React / TypeScript.
